question_text: Fever now or within last 48 hours?
Severe weakness or looks very ill (toxic)?
Confusion or new mental status change?
Trouble breathing or low oxygen concern?
Skin infection signs (red hot spreading area)?
Severe pain out of proportion anywhere?
New medication started in last 2-8 weeks?
Pain out of proportion to rash?
Severe vomiting or cannot keep fluids down?
